---
title: "maps_cbuckleyi"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(rgbif)
library(terra)
library(CoordinateCleaner)
library(countrycode)
library(dplyr)
```

# downloading ecu shapefile
```{r}
# GDAM Admin-1 (provinces) for Ecuador
ec <- geodata::gadm(country = "ECU", level = 1, path = "gadm_cache")

# Excluding Galapagos
ec_mainland <- ec[!grepl("Galápagos", ec$NAME_1, ignore.case = TRUE), ]
```

#downloading gbif data con cetrolene buckleyi
```{r}
gbif_cb <- occ_search(
              scientificName = "Centrolene buckleyi",  # confirmed name of the species
              hasCoordinate=T,                        # logical argument to choose occ. with coordinates
              limit= 2000,
              country = "EC"
              )

gbif_cb <- gbif_cb$data
```

# checking for duplicates and outliers:


```{r}
# the package only works with ISO3c country codes (i.e ECU) and gfib is ISO2c (i.e. EC) thus it must be changed.

gbif_cb$countryCode <- countrycode(gbif_cb$countryCode,
                                 origin = "iso2c",
                                 destination = "iso3c")

gbif_cb_clean <- clean_coordinates(gbif_cb,
                                 lon = "decimalLongitude",
                                 lat = "decimalLatitude",
                                 countries = "countryCode",
                                 tests = c("centroids", "duplicates", "outliers"))
```
```{r}
gbif_cb_clean <- gbif_cb_clean %>%
  filter(.dpl == "TRUE")
```

```{r}
plot(gbif_cb_clean)
```
```{r}
plot(ec_mainland)
occ <- vect(as.data.frame(gbif_cb_clean), geom = c("decimalLongitude", "decimalLatitude"), crs = "EPSG:4326")
occ <- project(occ, crs(ec_mainland))
plot(occ, add = TRUE)
```
```{r}
plot(ec_mainland, col = "green")
plot(occ, "year", add = TRUE, col = heat.colors(length(unique(occ$year))), cex = 0.5)
```

```{r}
# bin years into decades
gbif_cb<- gbif_cb %>%
  mutate(decade = floor(year / 10) * 10)

dec <- gbif_cb %>%
  group_by(decade) %>%
  summarise(n = n())
```

```{r}
# plot using ggplot2
library(ggplot2)
```

```{r}
ggplot(dec, aes(x= decade, y = n))+
  geom_col(fill= "steelblue", alpha = 0.7)+
  geom_line()+
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(1930, 2020, by = 10)) +
  labs(x = "Decade", y="Number of Occurences C. buckleyi")+
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
year_counts <- gbif_cb %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(n = n())

ggplot(year_counts, aes(x = year, y = n)) +
  geom_col(fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_line() +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(1930, 2020, by = 10)) +
  labs(x = "Year", y = "Number of occurrences",
       title = "Occurrence trend by year") +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
gbif_cb <- gbif_cb %>%
  mutate(fiveyear = floor(year / 5) * 5)

fiveyear_counts <- gbif_cb %>%
  group_by(fiveyear) %>%
  summarise(n = n()) %>%
  filter(fiveyear >= 1930 & fiveyear <= 2020)

ggplot(fiveyear_counts, aes(x = fiveyear, y = n)) +
  geom_col(fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_line() +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(1930, 2020, by = 5)) +
  labs(x = "Five-year period", y = "Number of occurrences",
       title = "Occurrence trend by five-year period") +
  theme_minimal()
```
